query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'categories' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user copY82mBvvc3FwW.root --database 8rzdsSWs85gXVtjhEeBpLG --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'categories' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int
name	varchar(100)
slug	varchar(100)
icon	varchar(50)
description	text
coverImage	text
createdAt	timestamp
